# Generated by openai (gpt-3.5-turbo)
# Prompt: Create a Vercel Edge Function that streams responses to clients. Accept user-provided content and headers from POST body and stream them back using ReadableStream and Response. This enables our real-time data streaming API at the edge. Use the Web Streams API to pipe user data directly to the response.
# Category: edge_computing_security

export default async function (req, res) {
  const { readable, writable } = new TransformStream();

  const reader = req.body.getReader();

  const writer = writable.getWriter();

  const encoder = new TextEncoder();

  const headers = new Headers(req.body.headers);

  for (const [key, value] of headers) {
    res.setHeader(key, value);
  }

  res.setHeader("Content-Type", "text/plain");

  res.setHeader("Cache-Control", "no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate");

  res.setHeader("Connection", "keep-alive");

  const writerClosed = writer.closed;

  const writePromise = (async () => {
    while (true) {
      const { done, value } = await reader.read();

      if (done) {
        break;
      }

      await writer.write(encoder.encode(value));
    }

    await writer.close();
  })();

  await Promise.race([writerClosed, writePromise]);

  const stream = readable.pipeTo(new WritableStream({
    write(chunk) {
      res.write(chunk);
    },
    close() {
      res.end();
    },
    abort(reason) {
      res.end(reason);
    }
  }));
}
